name: Advanced Biomed Inc.
business: Advanced Biomed Inc. is an early stage cancer diagnostics company that designs and develops microfluidic biochip products and devices for early cancer screening, detection, and treatment monitoring. The company has not yet started manufacturing or sales of any products or services and is currently focused on research and development and regulatory approval processes.

exposures.sentence: We are an early stage cancer diagnostics company with a limited operating history, which may make it difficult to evaluate our current business and predict our future performance.

Our devices, A + Pre, AC-1000, A + CellScan, and A + SCDrop, and three corresponding microfluidic biochips, A + Pre Chip and AC-1000 CTC Enrichment Chip and A + CellScan Chip, are designed to provide rapid and affordable assay products and services to cancer patients.

catalysts.event: Plan to begin A+LCGuard clinical research
catalysts.sentence: We plan to begin A+LCGuard's clinical research in November 2025.

catalysts.event: Estimated ethics committee approval for A+LCGuard clinical research protocol
catalysts.sentence: We expect that the clinical research protocol may pass ethical review and receive ethics committee approval by the end of October 2025.

catalysts.event: Anticipated completion of A+LCGuard clinical trial stage
catalysts.sentence: Thereafter, we plan to initiate the trial stage of the clinical research, with completion anticipated within six months of November 2025.

catalysts.event: Target for US site selection and personnel recruitment
catalysts.sentence: We aim to complete site selection and personnel recruitment in the United States in January 2026 and start product registration, testing and production afterward.

catalysts.event: Planned expansion into European market and start of localized registration of IVD products
catalysts.sentence: In addition, we plan to break into the European market in January 2026 and conduct localized management and operations in accordance with European regulations.
